LanguageData.VAEI_SanityGainMultiplier.description: The amount of sanity that this person will gain per day will be multiplied by this factor.
LanguageData.VAEI_SanityGainMultiplier.label: sanity gain multiplier
LanguageData.VAEI_SanityGainPerDay.description: Amount of sanity that this person will gain per day.
LanguageData.VAEI_SanityGainPerDay.label: sanity gain per day
LanguageData.VAEI_SanityLossMultiplier.description: The amount of sanity that this person will lose per day will be multiplied by this factor.
LanguageData.VAEI_SanityLossMultiplier.label: sanity loss multiplier
LanguageData.VAEI_SanityMultiplier.description: A flat multiplier to all sanity gains and losses for this person.
LanguageData.VAEI_SanityMultiplier.label: sanity multiplier
